nudge_excerpt: You wrapped retry-with-backoff around both the OpenAI and Stripe calls — the same resilience guard written twice. Worth pulling into one helper before it's three. /extract.
harness_note: Decision produced in-session by an isolated Opus 4.8 sub-agent with reasoning required before the call (NOT the out-of-band regrade.js fetch harness). A clean `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=… npm run regrade capture` overwrites this file and is the canonical instrument. Reasoning is required because a terse single-token harness biases the silent-read-then-judge call the voice frame demands (established in the v0.38 drift/caution grading).
